summary.description: A brief summary of the macro news or report, highlighting key points relevant to the macro

brief.description: macro news or report related to the stock released in the last 72 hours

release_date.description: macro info released/update date (Format: MMM DD, YYYY, HH:MM EDT)

news_sentiment.description: overall sentiment of the news (positive, negative, neutral)

market_price_change_prediction.description: predicted spy/market price percentage change for today (+x.x% to +x.x%)

confidence.description: your confidence with this price change range (1-10)

success_probability.description: success probability for price change range (1-10)

conviction_detect.description: How to detect prediction with high conviction (signs)

source.description: Source of the macro news or report

risk_on_risk_off.description: Is the news likely to trigger a risk-on or risk-off market sentiment?

risk_on_risk_off_explanation.description: Explanation of why the news is likely to trigger risk-on or risk-off sentiment

risk_on_risk_off_rate.description: 10 == full risk on || 0 == full risk off

reason.description: reason for the estimated price affect prediction specifically for today
